Package com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.structure

Interface ReadableStructure

All Superinterfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned
All Known Subinterfaces:
ReadableBakery, ReadableBreedingStructure, ReadableCastle, ReadableMine, ReadableNursery, ReadableObstacle
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractStructure, Bakery, BreedingStructure, Castle, Mine, Nursery, Obstacle, Structure, UnownedBakery, UnownedBreedingStructure, UnownedCastle, UnownedMine, UnownedNursery, UnownedObstacle, UnownedStructure
public interface ReadableStructure extends HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned
